Get or set selection model steps

Source: R/replacementFunctions.R
selmodel.Rd

Generic getter and setter for the selection model steps (selmodelSteps) component of a runMetaAnalysis object (after correctPublicationBias). See Replacement functions.

Usage

selmodel(x, ...)

selmodel(x) <- value

Arguments

x

Object of class runMetaAnalysis.

...

Optional arguments (ignored).

value

New value for selmodelSteps.

Value

For selmodel(x), the current selmodelSteps value. For selmodel(x) <- value, the updated object (invisibly).

On this page
